programme.title: Steam Train Britain
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of three preserved steam railway lines - the South Devon Railway heritage line, the Ffestiniog and Welsh Highlands Railway and the Great Central Railway. Sports scientist Megan Smith has a dream of tending the fire of a steam locomotive on the Ffestiniog & Welsh Highland Railway, and she stokes the bolier of NG143 and sets off along the 25 miles from Caernarfon to Porthmadog(n)

programme.title: Operation Gold Rush with Dan Snow
programme.desc: The historian follows in the footsteps of 19th-century gold prospectors, attempting to find riches in a remote region on the edge of the Canadian arctic. He is joined on his expedition by polar explorer Felicity Aston and physiologist Dr Kevin Fong. The first challenge of the trek is to cross Alaska's Coast Mountains, where they retrace two routes set by 19th-century miners and brave icy rivers, avalanche-prone slopes and near vertical ascents(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.title: Impossible Engineering

Pioneering innovators from the past such as Pierre Danel, who developed a system against the pounding sea, and 19th-century mechanic Richard Dudgeon made the project possible. The development of airports including Berlin's Tempelhof Airport and London's Croydon Airport are also explored to reveal how engineers attempted this feat of engineering.(n)

programme.title: Nazi Murder Mysteries

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris takes a railway trip across Canada, revealing how 2,500 miles of transcontinental railway was built against huge odds in just a few decades, helping to join together a vast wilderness of isolated communities and create the country that exists today. He begins his journey on one of the earliest sections of track to be built, on a train that is now a lifeline for hunters and fishermen. He then sees one of the biggest, most famous trains in the world - the Canadian, before heading for the Prairies, and on to the port of Vancouver. Along the way he also searches for Winnie the Pooh, crosses raging rivers and meets the descendant of a pioneering Yorkshire family who arrived here more than 100 years ago(n)

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: A look at the Airbus A380, which as the largest passenger plane ever built can carry more than 850 people non-stop nearly half-way around the world. With the largest wingspan of any commercial aircraft and four specially developed mighty turbo jet engines, the A380 weighs 560 tonnes and getting it off the ground would not have been possible without the work of past innovators such as George Cayley and Frank Whittle. Key developments in aerospace engineering - from Richard Whitcombe's energy-efficient wing-tip designs to Nasa engineers' cutting-edge control system, Fly by Wire - helped bring the A380 to fruition(n)

programme.desc: A look back at Timothy West and Prunella Scales' travels in Sweden, where they finally fulfilled their lifetime ambitions of crossing the country coast-to-coast by boat. The 350-mile journey takes in the mighty Göta Canal, Sweden's three biggest lakes, the islands of the Swedish Archipelago, and the Baltic sea - a huge challenge for any sailor let alone two octogenarians more used to the Kennet and Avon Canal. Even the relaxation is testing - a Swedish sauna with an icy plunge into the waters of the canal, but the long tranquil summer days, island-dotted lakes, and woodland glades make it Tim's favourite-ever trip(n)

programme.title: Queen Victoria's Last Love: Abdul Karim
programme.desc: The monarch's relationship with Indian servant Abdul Karim. He was initially employed as a waiter but soon rose to become Victoria's confidant and teacher, giving her daily lessons in Hindustani. His position violated racial and class taboos of the period, and the presence of a Muslim at the heart of the royal household caused problems for the politics of Empire, leading to a dramatic confrontation between the Queen and her family in 1897, which threatened to disrupt her Diamond Jubilee celebrations. Narrated by Geoffrey Palmer(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The miserable doctor is taken hostage by a man demanding immediate medical attention. Thirteen and several of the hospital's patients are also held captive by the gun-wielding stranger, while House tries to diagnose the man's condition in exchange for their lives(n)

programme.desc: An edition catching up with previous cases. Owed thousands in rent, landlord Matthew decided to evict his tenant, and called on an eviction specialist for help. As the tenant lived with seven cats, Matthew was worried about the state of the property, but that turned out to be the least of his problems. Cameras catch up with Matthew to see if he turned his property around. Having found a buyer for his house, Kirk asked the sitting tenant to leave. However, on the day of the move, she refused, stopped paying rent and Kirk's sale fell through. Kirk had to evict his nightmare tenant before he lost the house. Was he able to sell his property at least, or was he tempted to become a landlord once again?(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Documentary highlighting alarming tales from all sides of the buy-to-let system, drawing attention to stories of unruly tenants who refuse to pay their dues and rogue landlords who have failed to live up to their responsibilities. Paul discovers that an unruly tenant may be planning to do a runner(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The officers try to recover £13,000 owed by a high-performance car dealer in Birmingham, and in Wolverhampton the agents chase nearly £2,000 owed to a car hire company. Elsewhere, officers visit a family in Kent to try to collect more than £5,000, but an emotional backstory means they are forced to make a sensitive decision(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south-east London, officers Gary and Cona chase a debt of nearly £50,000 in unpaid rent, leading to a feisty confrontation with the debtor. Agents Gary and Paul try to recover over £2,000 owed by a teenager to a local garage in Kent, and officers Max and Paul head to south-west London on the trail of a film producer who owes £8,000 to financial advisers(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Coventry, the sheriffs chase £10,000 owed by a publican to a contractor. However, when he discovers people are falling ill after the cat chooses to sit next to them, he is forced to find an explanation for the apparently supernatural happenings. Meanwhile, Taub contemplates leaving the hospital(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Following a motorbike crash, House wakes up in hospital next to a man who is paralysed and cannot speak. Guest starring Mos Def, with Hugh Laurie(n)

programme.desc: People who have had their benefits cut or withheld since tougher sanctions began in October 2012, including Terry, whose payments were stopped after his partner clocked up more than 24 hours in one week in her job as a care worker. Drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.desc: Part two of two. New York homicide detective Laura Diamond is placed in mortal danger as Jon Dunham, the depressed son of the murdered executive, holds her hostage, wielding a home-made bomb. Meanwhile, unaware of her plight, the rest of her team remains on his trail. Debra Messing stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A politician is embroiled in a triple murder, but persuading him to reveal the truth is only the first step toward unmasking a killer willing to go to any lengths to avoid capture. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.desc: An investigation into a hit-and-run leads to a property scam, but Green, Rubirosa and Lupo's undercover work takes a surprising twist that pits McCoy against the US Attorney's office. January Jones (Mad Men) guest stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Fontana and Green investigate the murders of a group of heroin users in a raid on a drug den. The prime suspect is a warlord who aided American forces in Afghanistan and claims diplomatic immunity - but McCoy and Southerlyn refuse to be swayed in their attempts to prosecute. Drama, starring Dennis Farina, Jesse L Martin, Sam Waterston and Elisabeth Rohm(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A convicted child murderer is struck and left for dead by a motorist just weeks after his prison release, but Fontana and Green are initially unenthusiastic about finding out who ran him over. It is not until the killer dies from his injuries that they investigate inside the prison where he served his sentence - and uncover evidence that leads McCoy to make a startling discovery. Starring Dennis Farina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A legal-aid strike leads first to murder, and then to Rubirosa pitting her wits against Cutter as the ADA tries to bring a case against a pro golfer accused of the killing of a paralegal. American legal drama, starring Alana De La Garza and Linus Roache(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the world of online romance when a garage mechanic is murdered, but the case takes a series of bizarre turns before they are able to identify the killer. Police drama, starring Anthony Anderson and Jeremy Sisto(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murders of a porn star and a maverick publisher lead Fontana and his new partner Falco (The Sopranos' Michael Imperioli) to a powerful police commissioner who is expecting a promotion. DA Branch warns McCoy to tread carefully with the high-profile suspect - especially when an intimate link comes to light. Starring Dennis Farina and Sam Waterston(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A jockey is shot dead, leading Fontana and Falco into the murkier side of horse racing, where they discover the victim's prized thoroughbred was bought by a corporate boss using embezzled funds. McCoy takes control in court, but a witness's emotional outburst and the defendant's disappearance put the case in jeopardy. Starring Dennis Farina, Michael Imperioli and Sam Waterston(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The team investigates a heist on a train carrying weapons, while Pride spies on the mayor. Featuring a guest appearance by Sheryl Crow(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A judge's son is shot dead and his body dumped outside the courthouse shortly after a rapper receives a harsh custodial sentence. However, Logan and Wheeler soon realise the crime may have more to do with the victim's friends than the musician - with an old-fashioned playing card placed on the corpse a vital clue to the killer's identity. Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: One of the NYPD's own is implicated in a cover-up, and the SVU tries to unravel a complex sex trafficking operation with roots in government offices, the police department and the Catholic Church. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team sets out to track down a serial rapist, and traces the culprit to a homeless shelter, where the trail goes cold. Undeterred, Carisi decides to go undercover in an attempt to reveal the perpetrator's identity. New York-set police crime drama, directed by and starring Mariska Hargitay, with Peter Scanavino(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The Bakers, the stars of America's top reality TV show, are rocked by scandal when 13-year-old daughter Lane is discovered to be three months pregnant. Ultra-conservative parents Pam and Frank resist SVU involvement in a misguided attempt to shield their 10 children - and their lucrative TV empire - from disgrace. However, when Lane accuses one of the show's cameramen of raping her, one who happens to have already had a vasectomy, it becomes clear the Bakers are trying to protect someone. Unable to aid in the inquiry due to her own pregnancy, Rollins decides to make good use of her time away from the beat to binge-watch the Bakers' show in an effort to identify potential suspects. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hartigay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The hunt for a missing teenage girl takes an emotional toll on Sgt Dodds, and DNA evidence becomes the crucial link the team needs to identify the youngster's abductor. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A man arms himself and heads to a political rally where he embarks on a shooting spree, killing a state senator and several onlookers. Crime drama, starring Corey Stoll, Rachel Ticotin and Alfred Molina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: TJ and Morales find themselves embroiled in a complicated murder case after a casino worker is found dead in a bathtub. Crime drama, starring Corey Stoll(n)

Crime drama, starring Melina Kanakaredes and Robert Joy(n)

programme.desc: A riot at an immigration rally in Central Park ends in murder, and the political climate forces McCoy to assign a special prosecutor, who starts to increase tensions in the office with his anti-establishment attitude. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity leads Green and Lupo to suspect an innocent doctor has been murdered in place of a killer's true target, a physician who administered a botched lethal injection in South Carolina. Police drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Jeremy Sisto(n)

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.desc: Fontana and Falco discover a charred pistol after arresting an arsonist, which leads them to reinvestigate an unsolved murder. programme.desc: The team tries to prevent a miscarriage of justice after a young model is raped by a renowned fashion photographer, who looks to his successful brother to make the charges disappear. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hartigay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A contestant on a reality dating show claims to have been raped. Co-operating with the SVU, the programme's producers agree to let Benson and her team go undercover on the set for an incognito investigation. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.desc: A high-school student succumbs to the flirtations of an attractive female teacher, and begins to plan a clandestine encounter. However, he quickly finds himself in a far more terrifying situation. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.desc: After a woman is found dead by a neighbour, a conspiracy unfolds when detectives discover her boyfriend has also been murdered - with his body placed beneath his house. programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When a mass shooting occurs at a primarily Hispanic mortgage office, Winters and Jaruszalski begin begin investigating the surviving employees, in addition to their clients.
